title: Inventory check
subtitle: Open a session — scan IMEIs at each location — close to reconcile MATCH/MISMATCH/MISSING/EXTRA

open.title: Select warehouse to check
open.noWarehouseDesc: Go to Warehouse Management to create a warehouse and bins before checking.

scan.title: Scan IMEI
scan.duplicate: This IMEI was already scanned in this session

complete.title: End inventory session?
complete.content: {{count}} IMEIs successfully scanned. After ending, BE will reconcile and mark MISSING IMEIs (in DB but not scanned).

result.title: Inventory session completed
result.subtitle: Session <0>#{{id}}</0> recorded <1>{{count}}</1> IMEIs and reconciled. Visit <2>Audit log</2> or DB to view MATCH / MISMATCH / MISSING / EXTRA results.
